mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, content, type, related_id, is_read, is_accepted, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{content}, #{type}, #{relatedId}, FALSE, FALSE, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, content, type, related_id, is_read, created_at, is_accepted AS accepted FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE notifications SET is_read = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE notifications SET is_accepted = TRUE WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND related_id = #{relatedId} AND type = 'INVITE'
UPDATE notifications SET is_read = TRUE WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = FALSE
